title: The Concept of Our Great Power
description: A Gnostic apocalypse: the ages of the flesh, the psyche, and the spirit, ending with the dissolution of the material world.
introduction: A Gnostic apocalypse: the ages of the flesh, the psyche, and the spirit, ending with the dissolution of the material world.

translation.text: The first age is that of the flesh. The second is that of the soul. The third is that of the spirit.
